easy.name: Sinhagad Fort
easy.history: Site of the 1670 battle led by Tanaji Malusare under Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj.

easy.name: Lohagad Fort
easy.history: Built in the 18th century; used by Chhatrapati Shivaji Maharaj to store treasury.

easy.name: Tikona Fort
easy.history: Conquered by Malik Ahmad Nizam Shah I in 1585; later under Maratha control.

easy.name: Korigad Fort
easy.history: Built during the Maratha rule; offers panoramic views of the region.

easy.name: Sondai Fort
easy.history: Served as a watchtower for the region; offers views of the Matheran range.

moderate.name: Rajmachi Fort
moderate.history: Consists of Shrivardhan and Manaranjan forts; strategic location overlooking Bor Ghat.

moderate.name: Mahuli Fort
moderate.history: Important fort during the Maratha era; known for complex rock formations.

moderate.name: Visapur Fort
moderate.history: Built in the early 18th century; larger than Lohagad.

moderate.name: Sudhagad Fort
moderate.history: Dates back to 2nd century B.C.; considered a Maratha capital.

moderate.name: Irshalgad Fort
moderate.history: Served as a watchtower; offers views of Morbe Dam.

difficult.name: Harihar Fort
difficult.history: Built during the Yadava period; famous for its staircase carved into the rock face.

difficult.name: Ratangad Fort
difficult.history: Over 400 years old; captured by Shivaji Maharaj; overlooks Bhandardara.

difficult.name: Pratapgad Fort
difficult.history: Built by Shivaji Maharaj in 1656; site of the battle against Afzal Khan.

difficult.name: Vasota Fort
difficult.history: Also known as Vyaghragad; unconquered by the British due to dense forests.

difficult.name: Gambhirgad Fort
difficult.history: Less explored fort offering solitude and panoramic views.
